rows.label: qev025104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ahh, you're late! Too late!
Hurry up, the pizza!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hm... Are you a pizza?
If you are not a pizza, I have no business with you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_JNK0010
rows.name: Self-control

rows.label: qev025104_SEL0011
rows.name: Endure your anger and hand over the pizza.

rows.label: qev025104_JNK0020
rows.name: Apologize

rows.label: qev025104_SEL0021
rows.name: Hand over the pizza while apologizing.

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0003
rows.name:
You are late, late, late!!
You! Are you planning to starve me to death![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hm? You don't even have a word of apology!?
Unbelievable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0005
rows.name:
You are late, late, late!!
You! Are you planning to starve me to death![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0006
rows.name:
...No matter how much you apologize, my stomach won't fill up.
Ahh! Do you understand... with what feelings I've been waiting for that disk!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0007
rows.name:
Is this an outrage committed knowing that
I love pizza more than three meals a day!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0008
rows.name:
...What!? Do you have a complaint!
I am enraged!
Grudges over food are deep![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0009
rows.name:
I demand a discount from you!
Now! Discount it as a sign of your apology![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_JNK0030
rows.name: Enrage

rows.label: qev025104_SEL0031
rows.name: Explode with anger at the unreasonable complaint.

rows.label: qev025104_JNK0040
rows.name: Endure

rows.label: qev025104_SEL0041
rows.name: Endure the unreasonable complaint patiently.

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0010
rows.name:
Mukiii!
Are you making a fool of me because I'm a Ma-non!?
You are a very rude person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0011
rows.name:
That's enough!
Hurry up and leave the pizza, then get out of here!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0014
rows.name:
Why are you staying silent?
Do you think that will work on me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0015
rows.name:
I see... You are making a fool of me
because I'm a Ma-non, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hmph! If I am a pizza demon,
then you are just like a money demon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0017
rows.name:
That's enough!
Hurry up and leave the pizza, then get out of here!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0018
rows.name: Tell Powell to hire a more decent part-timer, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hmph!
Goodbye, then![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0020
rows.name: Phew... It was delicious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0021
rows.name:
My stomach is full and my mind has calmed down.
Grenade Pizza truly is the best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0022
rows.name:
Um... I apologize for losing myself earlier
due to extreme hunger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0023
rows.name:
Pizza truly is a sinful food...
To think it could change a single Ma-non this much...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0025
rows.name:
Did I... eat too much...
Grenade Pizza............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025104_MSG0026
rows.name: ...It seems I should... rest in a pod............[ST:wait ]
